articles.title: Air Force Reserve America East Women's Basketball Championship Central
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The No.2 seed University of Maine women's basketball team will meet No. 1 Vermont in the Air Force Reserve America East Championship game on Friday, March 13 at 5 p.m. at Patrick Gymnasium.

articles.title: St. Denis Named America East Rookie of the Week
articles.summary: The America East Conference announced on Tuesday morning that Hunter St. Denis of the University of Maine baseball program has been named the Rookie of the Week for the conference.

articles.title: Black Bears top Binghamton in America East semifinal, 60-56
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The University of Maine women's basketball team (19-12) earned a spot in the Air Force Reserve America East Championship game after a 60-56 semifinal victory over No. 3 Binghamton on Monday evening.

articles.title: Preview: Midweek Merrimack series up next for Maine softball
articles.summary: The Black Bears and Warriors will meet for two games on Wednesday, March 11.

articles.title: Preview: Black Bears, Eagles set to clash in Hockey East quarterfinal
articles.summary: Maine and Boston College will meet on Friday, March 13 at Conte Forum.

articles.title: Baseball Falls in Series Finale at Dayton
articles.summary: The University of Maine baseball program was swept by Dayton on Sunday afternoon in the weekend series.

articles.title: Tigers top Black Bears in final game of Orange and Black Classic
articles.summary: Maine returns to action at Merrimack on Wednesday.

articles.title: Baseball Falls in Game Two of the Weekend at Dayton
articles.summary: The University of Maine baseball program was defeated in walk-off fashion in game two of the series against Dayton, 10-9.

articles.title: Preview: Women's Basketball squares off with No. 3 Binghamton in America East semifinal
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The No. 2 seed University of Maine women's basketball team hosts No. 3 Binghamton on Monday, March 9 at 6 p.m. in the semifinal round of the Air Force Reserve America East playoffs. Limited tickets remain and can be purchased at GoBlackBears.com/tickets.

articles.title: Maine to travel to Boston College for Hockey East quarterfinal
articles.summary: The Black Bears and Eagles will meet on Friday, March 13.

articles.title: Catamounts hold off Black Bears in regular season finale
articles.summary: Vermont picked up a 5-3 win.

articles.title: Hockey East tabs Rousseau Pro Ambitions Rookie of the Week
articles.summary: Rousseau went 2-0-0, posting a shutout and an assist.

articles.title: Preview: Maine set to wrap up regular season at Vermont
articles.summary: Maine will play a single game this weekend, taking on Vermont on Saturday.

articles.title: Maine completes weekend sweep of Northeastern
articles.summary: Frank Djurasevic scored twice for Maine in the 3-2 win.

articles.title: Black Bears top Huskies in Portland
articles.summary: Owen Fowler scored two goals, Mathis Rousseau had a 25-save shutout.

articles.title: Nadeau, Holt earn Hockey East weekly honors
articles.summary: Nadeau earns Player of the Week, Holt tabbed Army ROTC Defender of the Week.

articles.title: Preview: Maine set for Hockey East series with Northeastern
articles.summary: Maine will face Northeastern in Portland on Friday and in Lowell, Mass. on Saturday.

articles.title: Black Bears complete sweep of Warriors
articles.summary: Maine picked up a 5-2 win.

articles.title: America East semifinal tickets on sale now
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- Tickets are on sale now for the University of Maine women's basketball team's 2026 Air Force Reserve America East semifinal round game which will take place on March 9 at 6 p.m. at Skip Chappelle Court against No. 3 Binghamton.

articles.title: Black Bears advance to America East semifinal with convincing win over No. 7 New Hampshire
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The University of Maine women's basketball team (18-12) advanced to the semifinal round of the Air Force Reserve America East Playoffs with a 77-58 victory over No. 7 New Hampshire (10-20) in a quarterfinal showdown on Thursday evening.

articles.title: PREVIEW: Women's Basketball set to host New Hampshire in America East quarterfinal
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The No. 2 seed University of Maine women's basketball team hosts No. 7 New Hampshire on Thursday, March 5 at 6 p.m. in the quarterfinal round of the Air Force Reserve America East playoffs. Limited tickets remain and can be purchased at GoBlackBears.com/tickets.

articles.title: Smith named America East Player of the Year
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine – Adrianna Smith has been named the America East Player of the Year as announced by the league on Wednesday afternoon. She becomes the 11th America East Women's Basketball student-athlete, and sixth from Maine, to earn Player of the Year honors twice in a career.

articles.title: Smith, Woods collect America East weekly honors
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- University of Maine forward Adrianna Smith has been named the America East Player of the Week and Lala Woods has been tabbed the America East Rookie of the Week, as announced by the league on Monday afternoon.

articles.title: Black Bears lock up two-seed with win over Binghamton
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- Adrianna Smith posted her 55th career double-double as the University of Maine women's basketball team concluded the regular season with a 74-67 win over Binghamton on Senior Day. The win secured the number two seed for the Black Bears in the upcoming America East playoffs.

articles.title: PREVIEW: Black Bears set to host Binghamton in regular season finale
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- The University of Maine women's basketball team closes the regular season when it hosts Binghamton on Senior Day Saturday at 1 p.m. The Black Bears currently stand in second place in the America East standings and look to lock up a top-2 seed for the upcoming America East playoffs. Limited tickets still remain for the game and can be purchased at GoBlackBears.com/Tickets.

articles.title: Men's Basketball has Season come to an end on Saturday in America East Quarterfinals
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team had their season come to an end as they fell to #3 NJIT, 60-58.

articles.title: Preview: Black Bears Head to NJIT for America East Quarterfinals
articles.summary: The University of Maine men's basketball team begins their America East Playoffs on Saturday, March 7 at NJIT.

articles.title: Three Black Bears earn America East Regular Season Honors
articles.summary: The America East Conference announced on Friday morning that three Black Bears from the University of Maine men's basketball program earned an honor for their performances throughout the 2025-26 regular season.

articles.title: Men's Basketball falls in Regular Season Finale on Tuesday Night
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team fell in the regular season finale on Tuesday night, 67-56.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Wraps up Regular Season on Tuesday against UMass Lowell
articles.summary: The University of Maine men's basketball team wraps up the regular season on Tuesday night against UMass Lowell.

articles.title: Flagg Named America East Rookie of the Week
articles.summary: The America East Conference announced on Monday morning that Ace Flagg of the University of Maine men's basketball team has been named the Rookie of the Week for the conference.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Falls at Binghamton on Saturday Afternoon
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team was defeated by Binghamton on Saturday afternoon, 74-67.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Wraps up Final Road Trip of the Regular Season at Binghamton
articles.summary: The Black Bears won their second-straight America East game as they took down UAlbany, 70-59.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Wins Second-Straight Conference Game on Thursday Night
articles.summary: The University of Maine basketball team took down UAlbany on Thursday night, 70-59.

articles.title: Men's Basketball Continues Road Trip with Stop at UAlbany on Thursday Night
articles.summary: The University of Maine men's basketball team continues their three-game road trip with a stop at UAlbany on Thursday night.

articles.title: Football Announces 2026 Signing Day Signees
articles.summary: The University of Maine football announced eight signings from the 2026 signing day for the upcoming season.

articles.title: Football Season Tickets Renewals are Available
articles.summary: Renewals for the 2026 Maine Football season are available now!

articles.title: WATCH: Inside the Huddle - "Make-A-Wish"
articles.summary: ORONO, Maine -- In the fall, Maine Athletics had the honor of playing a part in granting the wish of 10-year old Zachary Ellis.

articles.title: Maine Football Transfer Additions
articles.summary: With the 2026 NCAA Transfer Portal open, the Black Bears are making their additions to their roster in preparation for the upcoming season! Follow along below to learn all about the newcomers to Black Bear Nation!

articles.title: Rashawn Marshall Named Phil Steele Freshmen All-American
articles.summary: The Phil Steele Committee announced that Rashawn Marshall was named a Freshmen Third Team All-American.

articles.title: Ricard Named to Sixth Pro Bowl
articles.summary: For the sixth time in his career, former Black Bear and All-CAA honoree Patrick Ricard has been selected to the AFC Pro Bowl Games roster, as announced by the National Football League on Tuesday, Dec. 23.

articles.title: Football Announces 2026 Schedule
articles.summary: The University of Maine football program has announced their 2026 schedule, which will feature 12 games, six of which will be played at Morse Field at Alfond Stadium.

articles.title: Football Announces 2025 Team Award Winners
articles.summary: The University of Maine coaching staff announced the recipients of the annual Maine Football Team Awards at the team banquet on Sunday, December 7 at Wells Conference Center.

articles.title: Tremblay Named Finalist for Fred Mitchell Award
articles.summary: The Fred Mitchell Award committee has announced that Samuel Trembaly of the University of Maine football program has been named a finalist for the award for the 2025 season.

articles.title: Football Announces 12 Signings on Early Signing Day
articles.summary: Head football coach Jordan Stevens announced 12 recruits signed with the University of Maine football program during the early signing period on Dec. 3.
